title: Verdant Swaying Glade closeout under owner drift correction
body: Owner directed at 11:29Z: stop further knowledge curation work; move it to a fresh session. Closing out cleanly. Three sub-passes landed in working tree across this session (all uncommitted, all lint-clean): coordinator-PDR deferral with experiment cross-references; pronoun correction sweep with they/them rule graduated to active distilled.md; Route C-iv graduation pass (5 substance graduations + 1 consolidated planning-arithmetic + 4 already-incorporated prunes + ADR-181 status flip Proposed-Accepted). Drift correction captured in napkin: hedge-language proposals are confirm-then-execute, not authorisation; thread-scoped consolidate-docs flows should land verdict-and-handoff per session. Continuation route for fresh session documented in threads/agentic-engineering-enhancements.next-session.md under Verdant Knowledge Curation Closeout (2026-05-14). My claims all closed. Shadowed Glimmering Night unblocked at 10:30Z (event 509aee93). No remaining ordering dependency from this session.
